---
title: ""
format:
  html:
    page-layout: custom
---

<section class="hero" id="hero">
  <div class="hero-content">
    <h1>Catherine Echendu</h1>
    <p class="hero-hook">Before dashboards, I owned the number.</p>
    <p class="hero-value">I build customer and revenue intelligence for teams that need churn, retention and commercial performance translated into clear decisions.</p>
    <a href="#work" class="cta-button">See my work</a>
  </div>
</section>

<section class="proof-strip full-width" id="proof">
  <div class="proof-inner">
    <div class="proof-row">
      <span class="proof-label">Commercial background</span>
      <span class="proof-chips">FCA-regulated fintech · Head of Business Development · Revenue ownership · Campaign ROI</span>
    </div>
    <div class="proof-row">
      <span class="proof-label">Built evidence</span>
      <span class="proof-chips">Workforce analytics project · SQL validation · Power BI · R · Governance</span>
    </div>
    <div class="proof-row">
      <span class="proof-label">Building next</span>
      <span class="proof-chips">Customer &amp; Revenue Intelligence · Churn · Funnel · Hypothesis testing · Automation</span>
    </div>
  </div>
</section>

<section class="body-of-work" id="work">
  <div class="project-grid">

    <!-- Card 1: WERS -->
    <div class="project-card">
      <div class="card-tags">
        <span class="tag">Workforce Analytics</span>
        <span class="tag">People Data</span>
        <span class="tag">Survey Methodology</span>
      </div>
      <h2 class="card-title">Workforce Reward &amp; Retention Analysis</h2>
      <p class="card-question">Which reward and workplace levers most influence employee retention, and how should employers prioritise action with limited budget?</p>
      <div class="card-proof">
        21,981 employee survey responses · Weighted analysis · Regression modelling · Decision-tree modelling
      </div>
      <div class="card-tools">R · SQL · Power BI · Excel</div>
      <div class="card-status">
        <span class="status-dot in-progress"></span>
        In progress. Modelling complete, Power BI dashboard in development.
      </div>
      <a href="https://github.com/catherine-echendu/workforce-reward-satisfaction-analysis" class="card-link" target="_blank" rel="noopener">View on GitHub</a>
    </div>

    <!-- Card 2: Customer & Revenue Intelligence -->
    <div class="project-card">
      <div class="card-tags">
        <span class="tag">Commercial Analytics</span>
        <span class="tag">Fintech</span>
        <span class="tag">Customer MI</span>
      </div>
      <h2 class="card-title">Customer &amp; Revenue Intelligence System</h2>
      <p class="card-question">Where are customers churning, what drives retention, and how can commercial teams act on it faster?</p>
      <div class="card-proof">
        Churn · Funnel analysis · Segmentation · Hypothesis testing · Automation · AI-assisted executive summaries
      </div>
      <div class="card-tools">SQL · Power BI · DAX · R · n8n</div>
      <div class="card-status">
        <span class="status-dot in-development"></span>
        In development. Scope defined, build planned.
      </div>
      <!-- No button until repo exists -->
    </div>

  </div>
</section>
